{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Bloodline armor
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s [[bloodline armor]] faded to [[essence]] around her body.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
